name: Banana French Toast
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sugar substitute (to equal 1 tsp sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together yogurt, vanilla, and sugar substitute. Set aside.
2. Pour egg substitute into a shallow dish; dip each slice of bread in the egg substitute, coating both sides and ensuring all liquid is absorbed.
3. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray; over medium heat, cook the bread until browned on both sides. Remove to a heated platter, cover, and keep warm. In the same skillet, quickly cook banana slices until golden on each side.
4. Place 2 slices of bread on each serving plate; top evenly with yogurt mixture, banana slices, and syrup.
Each serving (2 slices) provides: 1/2 milk; 1 protein; 1 bread; 1/2 fruit; 25 optional calories. Per serving: 239 calories, 12 g protein, 2 g fat, 48 g carbohydrate, 150 mg calcium, 385 mg sodium, 1 mg cholesterol, 2 g dietary fiber.
Source: "Weight Watchers Favorite Homestyle Recipes."
